query:
-- Post LinkedIn di oggi e ieri
SELECT slot, status, publishedAt, content
FROM linkedin_posts
WHERE DATE(publishedAt) >= DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 2 DAY)
ORDER BY publishedAt DESC
LIMIT 10;
